name: Grand Strategist
xp_description: Gain 1 XP every time a Battlefield remains as Neutral Ground or under Your active Control.

levels.name: Tactical Bluff
levels.description: Once per turn during the Preparations Phase, you may shuffle a card from your hand face-down into one of your unrevealed Battalions, then return a different face-down card from that Battalion to your hand.

levels.name: Calculated Deployment
levels.description: During the Siege Phase, if you lose the dice roll to determine who deploys first, you may pay 1 Magium to force a re-roll.

levels.name: Tactical Gambit
levels.description: Once per game, during the Siege Phase, after all Battalions have been deployed, but they are revealed, you may instantly swap the locations of your two Battalions.
